mapper.sql: teamClassId, storeId, teamClassName, teamClassType, classPrice, totalNum, actulNum, coachId, coachName, energy, room, classTime, place,introduce, classDetail, classLabel, firstImgUrl, classImgUrl, createdDate
mapper.select: select teamClassId, storeId, teamClassName, teamClassType, classPrice, totalNum, actulNum, coachId, coachName, energy, room, classTime, place,introduce, classDetail, classLabel, firstImgUrl, classImgUrl, createdDate from team_class where teamClassId = #{teamClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select teamClassId, storeId, teamClassName, teamClassType, concat(classPrice,'') as classPrice, totalNum, actulNum, coachId, coachName, energy, room, classTime, place,introduce, classDetail, classLabel, firstImgUrl, classImgUrl, createdDate from team_class where teamClassId = #{teamClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: insert into team_class (teamClassId, storeId, teamClassName, teamClassType, classPrice, totalNum, actulNum, coachId, coachName, energy, room, classTime, place, classLabel, firstImgUrl, classImgUrl, createdDate, introduce, classDetail ) values (#{teamClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{teamClassName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{teamClassType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{classPrice,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{totalNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{actulNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{coachName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{energy,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{room,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{classTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{place,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{classLabel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{firstImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{classImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{introduce,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{classDetail,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} )

insert into team_class
teamClassId,
storeId,
teamClassName,
teamClassType,
classPrice,
totalNum,
actulNum,
coachId,
coachName,
energy,
room,
classTime,
place,
classLabel,
firstImgUrl,
classImgUrl,
createdDate,
introduce,
classDetail,
#{teamClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{teamClassName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{teamClassType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{classPrice,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{totalNum,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{actulNum,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{coachName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{energy,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
#{room,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{classTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{place,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{classLabel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{firstImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{classImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{introduce,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{classDetail,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update team_class
storeId = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
teamClassName = #{teamClassName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
teamClassType = #{teamClassType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
classPrice = #{classPrice,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
totalNum = #{totalNum,jdbcType=TINYINT},
actulNum = #{actulNum,jdbcType=TINYINT},
coachId = #{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
coachName = #{coachName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
energy = #{energy,jdbcType=DOUBLE},
room = #{room,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
classTime = #{classTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
place = #{place,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
classLabel = #{classLabel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
firstImgUrl = #{firstImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
classImgUrl = #{classImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
introduce = #{introduce,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
classDetail = #{classDetail,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where teamClassId = #{teamClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update team_class set storeId = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, teamClassName = #{teamClassName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, teamClassType = #{teamClassType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, classPrice = #{classPrice,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, totalNum = #{totalNum,jdbcType=TINYINT}, actulNum = #{actulNum,jdbcType=TINYINT}, coachId = #{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, coachName = #{coachName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, energy = #{energy,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, room = #{room,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, classTime = #{classTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, place = #{place,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, classLabel = #{classLabel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, firstImgUrl = #{firstImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, classImgUrl = #{classImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, introduce = #{introduce,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, classDetail = #{classDetail,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where teamClassId = #{teamClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update team_class set storeId = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, teamClassName = #{teamClassName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, teamClassType = #{teamClassType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, classPrice = #{classPrice,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, totalNum = #{totalNum,jdbcType=TINYINT}, actulNum = #{actulNum,jdbcType=TINYINT}, coachId = #{coachId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, coachName = #{coachName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, energy = #{energy,jdbcType=DOUBLE}, room = #{room,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, classTime = #{classTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, place = #{place,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, classLabel = #{classLabel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, firstImgUrl = #{firstImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, classImgUrl = #{classImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where teamClassId = #{teamClassId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
SELECT teamClassId, storeId, teamClassName, teamClassType, totalNum, actulNum, classTime, classLabel, firstImgUrl, classImgUrl, date_format(SUBSTR(classTime,1,16),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as startTime FROM team_class WHERE TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE,date_format( SUBSTR( classTime, 1, 16 ), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i' ), now()) < 0 AND storeId = #{storeId} ORDER BY startTime ASC
limit #{offset}, #{limit}
